body:
## Type

bug

## Target

tests/fixtures/self_fix_ticket_probe.py

## Current state

The controlled Tau self-fix proof fixture still says `STATUS = "bug"`.

## Requested outcome

Tau should process this ticket through `tau self-fix poll --dispatch --repair --apply-github`, run Memory-first intake, run the streaming Scillm-backed coder/reviewer loop, change the fixture to `STATUS = "fixed"`, commit and push the scoped repair, attach proof, and close the issue.

## Required proof

- Live GitHub issue selected by Tau poll.
- Memory `/intent` and `/recall` receipts.
- Coder and reviewer Scillm receipts with `stream:true`.
- Deterministic verification command exits `0`.
- Commit is pushed to `grahama1970/tau`.
- Proof comment is attached before close.

## Non-goals

No unrelated code changes.

```json
{
  "schema": "tau.self_fix_repair_request.v1",
  "request": "Repair the controlled Tau self-fix ticket probe fixture.",
  "target_file": "tests/fixtures/self_fix_ticket_probe.py",
  "find_text": "STATUS = \"bug\"",
  "replace_text": "STATUS = \"fixed\"",
  "verification_commands": [
    "python -m py_compile tests/fixtures/self_fix_ticket_probe.py"
  ],
  "commit_message": "Resolve controlled self-fix ticket probe"
}
```

<!-- ticket-skill
type: bug
target: tests/fixtures/self_fix_ticket_probe.py
route: backend_python_or_skill_runtime
agent: coder
-->

labels.description: Python CLIs, runtime, harness, and skill integration route
labels.name: route:backend_python_or_skill_runtime

title: Controlled Tau self-fix poll should repair proof fixture
